sections.paragraph: for מְנָאת (from the root מָנָה), pl. מְנָאות Neh 12:44, and מְנָיֹות Neh 12:47 13:10 (with Kametz impure); f. a part, a portion; Psa 63:11, מְנָת שֻׁעָלִים יִֽהְיוּ “they shall be the portion (i.e. prey) of foxes;” Psa 11:6, “a wind of hot blasts (is) מְנָת כֹּוסָם the portion of their cup,” i.e. is poured out for them, Psa 16:5. Used of portions of food, Neh. l.c.
